name: Patient 22
history: Ongoing difficulties with partner Ivan and his family. Recent trust/betrayal issues with Ivan. Ongoing contact with Ivan's family.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be taken advantage of
intermediate_belief: His family will always side with him and minimize my pain.
intermediate_belief_depression: I'm stuck in a cycle of hurt and forgiveness.
coping_strategies: Minimizing own feelings, compliance, silent resentment.
situation: Ivan's mother says "boys will be boys" and asks patient to "forgive and forget."
auto_thought: "My pain doesn't matter. They think I'm overreacting. I'm alone in this."
behavior: Forces a smile, says "I'll try," leaves room quickly, cries in bathroom.
